text.title: WebSocket Design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the websocket-design methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: define-envelope
step.action: Write the shared {v, type, channel, seq, ts, payload} schema in Zod/Pydantic/protobuf. Bump v for breaking changes.

step.name: wire-heartbeat
step.action: Add server-side ping/pong: disconnect after 2 missed pongs. Client pings every 25s.

step.name: implement-reconnect
step.action: Add full-jitter exponential backoff capped at 30s + maxAttempts. Reject PRs without random() in the diff.

step.name: horizontal-scale
step.action: Replace in-process fan-out with Redis Pub/Sub channel subscriptions (one channel per logical topic).

step.name: smoke-load-test
step.action: Run k6 for 60s; assert status 101 + heartbeat success + reconnect after node restart.
step.decision-gate: Reject if reconnect storm peaks > 2x steady auth RPS.
